sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: South Korea blocks 14 crypto exchanges on Apple Store - Report
feed.summary: South Korea is expanding a ban on digital asset firms' applications servicing its citizens. On April 11, the country's Financial Services Commission ( FSC ) announced that 14 crypto exchanges were blocked on the Apple store.

feed.title: Applied Digital Q3 Earnings: Revenue Misses Estimates Despite Strong Cloud Services Growth, Shares Slide - Applied Digital  ( NASDAQ:APLD )
feed.summary: Applied Digital reports third-quarter revenue of $52.9 million, missing analyst estimates of $63.42 million. Applied Digital reports a third-quarter adjusted loss of 8 cents per share, beating analyst estimates for a loss of 11 cents per share.
